codeReview.summary: The fix directly addresses the prior blocking issue by removing `clearedBaselineSeq` gating from `RuntimeEventLog` and relying on the provider contract (`clearRuntimeEventLog` empties buffer + resets seq). The added runtime test covers the exact failing sequence (seed -> clear -> post-clear seq reset to 1/2) and confirms post-clear rows render immediately; no regressions were found in the reviewed diff.

summary: Reviewed fix feature against prior failure report and original feature context. Commit ecffb4d removes the faulty seq-baseline filter path and adds targeted test coverage for post-clear seq reset behavior; the original blocking defect is resolved with no new high-confidence actionable issues.
